summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. All five hydrated PRs are open, non-security-sensitive, and should remain independent rather than be closed, merged, or fixed by this worker.

actions.reason: Independent focused PR that should continue through normal maintainer review outside this inventory cleanup.
Independent candidate needing proof; failing proof blocks merge/fixed-by-candidate handling but does not justify closure.
Maintainer-owned focused product/compatibility work that is not a duplicate or low-signal cleanup target; failing checks and breadth keep it outside closure/merge planning.
Independent candidate needing proof and CI repair; there is no hydrated canonical or closeout basis in this inventory shard.
Draft maintainer-owned work in progress; not closable as duplicate, superseded, or low-signal from this shard.
